name: CHINA PETRO.+CHEM.ADR/100
summary: CHINA PETRO.+CHEM.ADR/100 represents the American Depositary Receipt (ADR) for China Petroleum & Chemical Corporation (Sinopec). Sinopec is a major integrated energy and chemical company engaged in oil and gas exploration, refining, and marketing, as well as the production and sale of chemicals. The company is based in China.
